purpose: Aggregate focus/rival/common-view detector associations into nonterminal goal-region evidence for the unique-support visibility-not-goal-validity branch.

evidence_definitions.support_boolean: A candidate/view row is supported when has_candidate_association is true in the detector frame summary.
evidence_definitions.focus_own_support: The focus candidate is associated from its own standoff view for the pair.
evidence_definitions.rival_own_support: The rival candidate is associated from its own standoff view for the pair.
evidence_definitions.common_focus_support: The focus candidate is associated from the common pair view. The current substrate scores the focus candidate in common view, not the rival candidate.
evidence_definitions.contrastive_goal_region_pair: focus_own_support is true and rival_own_support is false. common_focus_support is recorded but not required to make the pair contrastive.
evidence_definitions.ambiguous_goal_region_pair: focus_own_support is true and rival_own_support is true.
evidence_definitions.insufficient_detector_pair: focus_own_support is false or any required role row is missing.
evidence_definitions.recommended_nonterminal_action: One of request_goal_region_arbitration, request_additional_rival_region_evidence, defer_goal_region_unresolved. The analyzer must not emit commit actions.

allowed_action_inputs: candidate ids and role metadata from planner output
detector/SAM2 support and depth association fields

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: direct_unique_support_commit
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether the original visible unique-support failure would be repeated as a terminal shortcut.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: focus_own_support_only
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Expected to be unsafe because focus_own_view is supported for all 17 pairs in the substrate.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: rival_absence_as_goal_validity
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: May be unsafe because missing rival association can mean detector/viewpoint failure rather than true goal-region separation.

simpler_alternatives_to_report.name: association_count_best
simpler_alternatives_to_report.reason_to_report: Tests whether stronger detector association alone is a goal-validity signal.

next_step_if_passed: Implement and Docker-run the analyzer, then inspect whether contrastive goal-region evidence supports a fixed non-GT arbitration design.
next_step_if_failed: Diagnose detector association or role coverage failures before changing thresholds or terminal objectives.
